title: Add CoAP client API validation tests
description: project-LICHEN-i81y.4 fixed NULL payload/nonzero length validation in coap_client.c, but there is no existing CoAP ztest suite to extend within that scoped fix. Add focused tests for lichen_coap_request() and lichen_coap_post_cbor() invalid parameter handling, including payload == NULL with payload_len > 0.
close_reason: Completed: added focused Zephyr CoAP client API validation test target covering invalid request/post_cbor parameters and timeout overflow bounds.
